sglang.title: Make the server random by default
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Do not set the default value of the global random seed, so the server can be random by default

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix arguments passed to `Sequence` in stop checker test
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Incorrect arguments are being passed to Sequence in #5077 after it was changed in #4328.
This PR updates the test in #5077 to fix this issue.

vllm.title: [Core] Cross-attention KV caching and memory-management (towards eventual encoder/decoder model support)
vllm.author: afeldman-nm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is a step towards encoder/decoder model support. This PR (1) allows a SequenceGroup to be associated with 0 or 1 encoder sequences, and (2) causes an encoder/decoder model to leverage a separate "cross-attention KV cache" when performing decoder cross-attention.
To that end, "cross-attention

vllm.title: [Bugfix][CI/Build] Fix test and improve code for `merge_async_iterators`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes an issue where merge_async_iterators tests cannot be run in python<3.10 due to lack of anext builtin. It also moves the test to a more appropriate location (test_utils.py).
Functionality-wise, this PR enables async tasks in merge_async_iterators to be cancelled with a message starting

vllm.title: [Bugfix][CI/Build] Fix codespell failing to skip files in `git diff`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes an issue where codespell incorrectly includes files returned by git diff even though they are supposedly filtered by the skip CLI option. This is probably related to an existing bug in codespell (codespell-project/codespell#1915).
This PR also updates the skipped directories to be cons

vllm.title: [Core] Avoid the need to pass `None` values to `Sequence.inputs`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#4328 made it necessary to pass prompt and multi_modal_data to Sequence regardless of whether it is actually being used. This PR removes the need to do so, simplifying the construction of dummy Sequences in tests.
Related contributions
This is part 4/5 of #5004.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] logprobs is not compatible with the OpenAI spec #4795
vllm.author: Etelis
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
This PR addresses several issues related to logprobs handling and sampling in the vLLM project.


Changed default value of top_logprobs:

In ChatCompletionRequest class, changed the default value of top_logprobs from None to 0.
Commented out the check in to_sampling_params method to allo

vllm.title: [Doc][Build] update after removing vllm-nccl
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Remove some old comments and commands designed for vllm-nccl.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] gptq_marlin: Ensure g_idx_sort_indices is not a Parameter
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
gptq_marlin uses "g_idx_sort_indices" buffer to store the sort indices of "g_idx". This PR ensures that "g_idx_sort_indices" is not considered a Parameter, and therefore, is not expected to be loaded from a model.
Fixes this bug report: #5088
The model involved is: https://huggingface.co/TechxGenus/
